text.title: Performance Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the performance-architecture methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: set-numeric-slos
step.action: Translate user-visible expectations into numeric SLOs.

step.name: establish-baseline
step.action: Run baseline; record p95/p99 at current RPS.

step.name: design-cache-topology
step.action: Plan CDN / Redis / DB cache placement per endpoint with TTL + eviction.

step.name: wire-load-test-gate
step.action: Author k6 script with thresholds derived from SLO; add to CI.

step.name: define-scaling-triggers
step.action: Pick observable triggers (CPU%, queue depth, latency growth) with thresholds; sync HPA / scaler.

step.name: publish-spec
step.action: Compose performance spec; review with SRE + PM.
